title: Microfractionation of a fungal culture extract
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"v9gwf","text":"Protocol for microfractionation of a complex culture extract  to facilitate bioactivity screening and dereplication of active microfractions through advanced chemical annotation tools.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5n77p","text":"extraction of fungal culture completed and extract dried","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"afshs","text":"Use nitrile gloves, safety goggles and lab coat.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"xuyjk","text":"HPLC- grade Solvents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"iloir","text":"DMSO (for dilution)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41juf","text":"HPLC vials for storage","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kbbot","text":"Collection tubes (minimum capacity 20 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nxpn","text":"Evaporator (centrifugal or lyophilizer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gfg4c","text":"-80 °C freezer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 66 mg of crude extract in 200 µL of DMSO (or any equivalent proportions to obtain a final concentration of 330 mg/mL DMSO). Inject 100 µL of this solution per fractionation cycle (equivalent to 33 mg of extract).

Column maintained at 30 °C Autosampler at 25 °C Column: Phenomenex® Synergy™ Hydro-RP Flow rate: 10 mL/min UV detection at 190, 254, 280 and 310 nm or the total absorbance mode with wavelength rate from 190 to 400nm Total fractionation time: 60 min Fractionation: 30 tubes, 20 mL each 2 min collection per fraction Separation gradient:

Collect 30 fractions of 20 mL each in numbered tubes. For each fraction: Withdraw 10% of the volume (2 mL) and transfer to an HPLC vial. Store immediately at -80 °C Dry the remainder of the fractions in the automatic evaporators or freezer dryer Store the dried fractions at -80 °C

Thermo Scientific™ Ultimate 3000 HPLC system equipped with DAD detector, column oven and fractions collector. Automatic sample evaporators: Genevac (HT4X and EZ/2). Freeze-dryer: Christ Beta 2-8 LO Plus
creator: Clémence ROHÉE
